description: The wider compiler2 sweep still fails in source-surface and macro coverage after the current arc. Current failures include port_macros_test::cross_module_macro_qualifies_names_against_home_module and port_misc_test cases around multiple test blocks, test macro passing/failing assert compilation, and whitespace assignment parsing/binding. Recover the intended compiler-defined fragment, home-module qualification, and parser behavior without reintroducing old-world shims.
title: Compiler2 source-surface sweep: recover cross-module macro qualification and parser/test-macro regressions
